languages.text: Камилла отреагировала на предположение о ее губернаторстве подозрительно бурно. Не стремится ли она занять этот пост? И каким образом?

traits.locale_text: Камилла отреагировала на предположение о ее губернаторстве подозрительно бурно. Не стремится ли она занять этот пост? И каким образом?

languages.text: Camilla reacted suspiciously to the idea of her as governor. Does she covet the position? And by what means might she claim it?
languages.original_text: Камилла отреагировала на предположение о ее губернаторстве подозрительно бурно. Не стремится ли она занять этот пост? И каким образом?

traits.locale_text: Camilla reacted to the suggestion of her governorship with suspicious vehemence. Does she covet the position? And by what means might she obtain it?
Camilla reacted to the suggestion of her governorship with suspicious vehemence. Does she covet the position? And by what means might she obtain it?
Camilla reacted suspiciously to the idea of her as governor. Does she covet the position? And by what means might she claim it?
Camilla reacted suspiciously to the idea of her as governor. Does she covet the position? And by what means might she claim it?

languages.text: Camilla hat verdächtig auf ihre mögliche Ernennung zur Gouverneurin reagiert Strebt sie die Position etwa an? Und zu welchen Mitteln würde sie greifen?
languages.original_text: Camilla reacted suspiciously to the idea of her as governor. Does she covet the position? And by what means might she claim it?

traits.locale_text: Camilla hat verdächtig auf ihre mögliche Ernennung zur Gouverneurin reagiert Strebt sie die Position etwa an? Und zu welchen Mitteln würde sie greifen?

languages.text: Camilla a réagi de façon suspecte à la mention du titre de gouverneure. Se pourrait-il qu'elle convoite ce poste ? Par quel moyen pourrait-elle l'obtenir ?
languages.original_text: Camilla reacted suspiciously to the idea of her as governor. Does she covet the position? And by what means might she claim it?

traits.locale_text: Camilla a réagi de façon suspecte à la mention du titre de gouverneure. Se pourrait-il qu'elle convoite ce poste ? Par quel moyen pourrait-elle l'obtenir ?

languages.text: 卡米拉对让她担任总督一事反应异常。她是否在觊觎这个位置？又打算如何夺取它？
languages.original_text: Camilla reacted suspiciously to the idea of her as governor. Does she covet the position? And by what means might she claim it?

traits.locale_text: 卡米拉对让她担任总督一事反应异常。她是否在觊觎这个位置？又打算如何夺取它？

languages.text: Camilla ha reaccionado de una manera sospechosa ante la idea de ser nombrada gobernadora. ¿Quizá anhela ese cargo en secreto? ¿Y qué estaría dispuesta a hacer para conseguirlo?
languages.original_text: Camilla reacted suspiciously to the idea of her as governor. Does she covet the position? And by what means might she claim it?

traits.locale_text: Camilla ha reaccionado de una manera sospechosa ante la idea de ser nombrada gobernadora. ¿Quizá anhela ese cargo en secreto? ¿Y qué estaría dispuesta a hacer para conseguirlo?

languages.text: カミラは知事就任の提案に、怪しげなほど嬉しそうに反応した。ダーゴナスの現状を考えると、彼女はそのポストに憧れないのだろうか？どんな形で？
languages.original_text: Camilla reacted to the suggestion of her governorship with a suspiciously ebullience. Given the current state of affairs on Dargonus, does she not aspire to the post? And in what way?

languages.text: Camilla, kendisinin vali olması fikrine şüpheli yaklaştı. Bu mevkiyi arzuluyor mu? Bunu hangi yollarla elde edebilir?
languages.original_text: Camilla reacted suspiciously to the idea of her as governor. Does she covet the position? And by what means might she claim it?

traits.locale_text: Camilla, kendisinin vali olması fikrine şüpheli yaklaştı. Bu mevkiyi arzuluyor mu? Bunu hangi yollarla elde edebilir?
